description: Template for agency investigations, settlement negotiations, remedies, and enforcement escalation affecting a target entity.

starter_sources.description: complaints, press releases, consent orders, rulemaking context
internal control reports, remediation programs, monitor reports where available
recent enforcement actions against comparable entities or conduct

ingestion_priorities: fresh official notices and case documents
freshness_notes: Official case materials and comparable precedent should drive the near-term state. Older enforcement history is most useful for pattern and remedy analogs.
